b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Documents"}],": All stored documents via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"documents.list()"}]," pagination"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Search results"}],": Results from ",["$","code",null,{"children":"search.execute()"}]," for key queries"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Container tags"}],": SuperMemory container tags mapped to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Document metadata"}],": Original metadata and timestamps preserved"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Titles"}],": Document titles stored in metadata with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"supermemory\""}]]}],"\n"]}]
c:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Options"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Dry run to preview\nhermes mnemosyne import --from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx --dry-run\n\n# Filter by container/tag\nhermes mnemosyne import --from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx --container my-project\n\n# Assign to a channel\nhermes mnemosyne import --from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx --channel-id docs\n\n# Include search results\nhermes mnemosyne import --from supermemory --api-key sk-xxx --include-search\n"}]}]
e:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Extraction Methods"}]
f:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"documents.list()"}]}]," — Paginated listing of all stored documents"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"search.execute()"}]}]," — Results from semantic search (optional, use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"--include-search"}],")"]}],"\n"]}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":"Both methods preserve original IDs and timestamps so nothing is lost."}]
11:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Identity Mapping"}]
12:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"SuperMemory Field"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne Field"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Document content"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Document title"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata.title"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Container tags"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"channel_id"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Document metadata"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"metadata"}]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Created/updated"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Preserved in metadata"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Search results"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source=\"supermemory_search\""}]]}]]}]]}]]}]
13:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Programmatic Import"}]
14:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne import Mnemosyne\nfrom mnemosyne.core.importers import import_from_supermemory\n\nmnemosyne = Mnemosyne(session_id=\"migration\")\n\nresult = import_from_supermemory(\n    api_key=\"sk-xxx\",\n    mnemosyne=mnemosyne,\n    container=\"my-project\",         # optional filter\n    channel_id=\"docs\",              # optional\n    dry_run=True,                   # try True first\n)\n\nprint(f\"Imported {result.imported} of {result.total}\")\n"}]}]
